Plant Disease Detection Web App

Real-time plant disease detection with preventive insights.

View Source Code

This project is a high-performance web application designed to help farmers identify crop diseases instantly. By integrating TensorFlow Lite, the app performs real-time inference on leaf images, providing not just a diagnosis, but actionable prevention tips in multiple languages.

Key Functionalities

  • ✅ Live Detection: Real-time analysis via webcam or file upload.
  • ✅ Visual Insights: Heatmaps highlighting affected leaf areas.
  • ✅ Accessibility: Multilingual PDF reports and Text-to-Speech support.

Skills Applied

Model DeploymentAPI DevelopmentReal-Time InferenceMultilingual SupportData VisualizationReport GenerationComputer Vision

Tools Used

PythonFlaskTensorFlow LiteOpenCVJavaScriptBootstrapChart.js
